experience.title: Art Director
responsibilities: Led creative projects involving graphic design and visual storytelling.
Collaborated with team members to draft conceptual designs based on client briefs.
Managed and organized art exhibitions, enhancing community engagement with local artists.
Supervised a team of junior designers and provided mentorship to foster their artistic growth.

experience.title: Independent Artist
responsibilities: Developed and marketed a portfolio of original artworks to local galleries and online platforms.
Engaged with clients to understand their vision and provided personalized artistic solutions.
Conducted art workshops to educate and inspire budding artists in the community.

response.summary: Creative and passionate Art Director with a strong background in visual arts and community engagement. Proven ability to lead diverse teams and drive innovative projects. Seeking to pivot into a new field where creativity and strategic thinking can be leveraged.
